reason: All steps executed successfully - agent received message and responded with correct answer "4" to the math question
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Located agent "QA-20260428-180006-6tfx" in sidebar with idle status and clicked it - Agent page opened with message input field visible
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator in top right shows "idle"
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered in input field and send button became enabled
Clicked Send button - Message submitted, agent status changed to "working" with activity indicator showing
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received in 1 second with agent returning "4"
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Screenshot confirms response shows "4" with "Worked for 1s" metadata, agent status returned to idle
